stories.title: Physicists create a strange new quantum state called a fractional fermi sea
stories.desc: Researchers have shown that ultracold atoms can be driven into a strange new quantum state called a fractional Fermi sea, where particles organize themselves in unexpected ways. The discovery points to a new phase of matter that goes beyond established quantum theories and could expand the…

stories.title: Sentinel-1 shows ground displacement after Venezuela earthquakes
stories.desc: Image: The map is an interferogram derived from the comparison of Sentinel-1 data on two dates: on the 18 June before the earthquakes and on 25 June a day after.

stories.title: Star-Spangled City
stories.desc: Two hundred years ago, a battle in the port city of Baltimore inspired the writing of America’s national anthem. The post Star-Spangled City appeared first on NASA Science .
